home.heroSubtitle: The community for people who love Île de Ré — summer and winter alike.
home.audienceSubtitle: Whether you live here year-round or visit in summer, Le Ré-seau is your space.
home.audience1Text: Find people to go surfing, cycling, or grab drinks on the beach.
home.audience2Text: Connect with families, organise outings, find a local service.
home.audience3Text: Meet your neighbours, share good tips and stay connected to the island.
home.featureCommunityDesc: Meet and connect with residents and visitors of the island.
home.featureActivitiesDesc: Suggest or join outings organised on the island.
home.featureDiscussionsDesc: Themed chat rooms and a forum to help each other and share.
home.featureJobsDesc: Find or offer a helping hand and small jobs on the island.
home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Free, no ads, made with ♥ for the island.
home.footerTagline: An independent local platform to connect residents and visitors of Île de Ré.
